summary: Frontend-only test of /kasa entry card 3-way balance breakdown (POSTAN GELEN | NAKİT + NET TOPLAM). All 7 test cases (T1-T7) passed. Values match spec exactly for hayriye and osman entries, plus aggregated grand totals. Action sheet still opens with title on tap; long-press delete Alert.alert verified via code inspection.
critical_code_review_comments: Header eyebrow text on /kasa is 'POSTAN GELEN' (line 55 of kasa.tsx) — unchanged in this iteration but appears to be leftover copy from the older single-value layout. Consider replacing with 'ÖZET' or similar since the aggregated card below now shows all three values. Non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: Test seeded 2 kasa entries via UI: hayriye (Tutar 6000, Pos 4000) and osman (Tutar 21640, Pos 2848,50), both using default rates 1,99%/5%. localStorage cleared at start of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature verified: kasa entry cards now show 3-way breakdown (POSTAN GELEN | NAKİT + NET TOPLAM with divider). testID for entry cards: kasa-row-<id>. Grand balance card testID: kasa-grand-balance. Action sheet testID: kasa-action-sheet.

test_results_detail.T1_add_hayriye_pos: PASS — entry added, POS sale (Tutar 6000, Pos 4000, 1,99/5) saved successfully.
test_results_detail.T2_hayriye_card_breakdown: PASS — card shows: 'H' avatar, 'hayriye', '1 işlem', POSTAN GELEN 3.916,42 ₺, NAKİT 6.000,00 ₺, NET TOPLAM 9.916,42 ₺. Exact match with spec.
test_results_detail.T3_osman_card_breakdown: PASS — card shows: POSTAN GELEN 2.788,98 ₺, NAKİT 21.640,00 ₺, NET TOPLAM 24.428,98 ₺. Exact match with spec.
test_results_detail.T4_grand_balance_aggregate: PASS — grand card: POSTAN GELEN 6.705,40 ₺, NAKİT 27.640,00 ₺, NET TOPLAM 34.345,40 ₺. Exact match with spec.
test_results_detail.T5_tap_opens_action_sheet: PASS — tapping hayriye row opens kasa-action-sheet with title 'hayriye' and identical 3-way balance card inside (3.916,42 / 6.000,00 / 9.916,42).
test_results_detail.T6_long_press_delete: PASS (code inspection) — /app/frontend/app/kasa.tsx lines 139-148 wires onLongPress to Alert.alert with 'Vazgeç' / 'Sil' options that calls deleteKasaEntry(e.id). Alert.alert is not automatable on RN-web so runtime check is not possible.
test_results_detail.T7_styling: PASS — entryCard has rounded corners (radius.card), entryHeader row with avatar+name+işlem, entryBalanceWrap uses lighter bgSecondary background with balanceSplitRow (two columns + vertical divider) and entryNetRow with a top border acting as the divider above NET TOPLAM. Screenshots confirm layout.
